name: io.github.inite-ai/inite-brain-service
title: Inite Brain
description: Open-source memory layer for LLM agents — bitemporal knowledge graph (SurrealDB) with facts, episodes, and procedural tiers. Hybrid vector + BM25 + multi-hop retrieval, planner-LLM and claim-verifier, conflict resolution (supersede/competing/revive), and GDPR-grade forget_entity. LoCoMo-benchmarked against Mem0, Zep, and MemGPT.

companyId.description: Tenant identifier issued at signup — scopes the memory graph to your company.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <API_KEY> — issued from the brain.inite.ai dashboard. Scoped to read / write / admin.
